Rabindra Bharati University Entrance.note: RBU publishes only provisional admission/merit lists based on qualifying-exam marks (department-wise, roll-number lists). No college-branch opening/closing rank cutoffs are published publicly.

Rajasthan Bachelor of Business Administr.note: No public college-wise BBA rank/cutoff table found; Rajasthan BBA admissions are merit-list/qualifying-marks based across colleges. Competitor links list general BBA colleges, not exam cutoff rows.

Rashtriya Raksha University (Police).note: RRU releases only provisional merit lists (JEE Main/RCET/qualifying-marks based). No public college-branch opening/closing rank or cutoff-score table found.

Sikkim Bachelor of Business Administrati.note: No BBA-specific entrance rank/cutoff data found. Sikkim (Central) University admits via CUET (no BBA program); only CUET course scores exist, not BBA college-branch rank rows.
